concerns.text: SC-001 specifies '≥ 5%' threshold. Per spec template guidance, planning docs should defer specific empirical values using [deferred] marker. Current phrasing is measurable but violates template convention.
SC-002 states 'designed to complete within' which is design intent, not a verifiable requirement. Should be 'MUST complete within' to match FR-style verifiability.

SC-004 requires 'identical mean accuracy difference' across runs with different random seeds. This is testable but scientifically unrealistic—different seeds should produce variance. Should specify acceptable variance or statistical equivalence.
FR-011 has 'Clarification needed' label but then provides the clarification inline. Inconsistent formatting—either remove label or keep as unresolved.
Edge Cases section lists questions without specifying expected system behavior. Should be converted to requirements or acceptance criteria for verifiability.
